title: Natural Selection buffs non-effect creatures of AL 5 or less

card.rawText: Only affects non-effect creatures of AL 5 or less. Atk: +7. Hit: +7.

effect.target: Non-effect creatures with base/current AL 5 or less

plan.title: Natural Selection buffs non-effect creatures of AL 5 or less
plan.summary: Place Natural Selection as a field card and verify its non-effect AL <=5 aura route is available.

notes: Pre-place Natural Selection on field magic slot as a field-active Magic card.
Only affects non-effect creatures of AL 5 or less.

steps: Put Natural Selection in player_1 field magic slot.
Use a non-effect AL 3 primary creature.
Verify the field aura stat modifier route is represented.

expectedAssertions.label: Natural Selection stays in player_1 magic slots

manualVerification: Creatures with effects or AL above 5 should not receive the buff.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the headless expected-success route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_016_natural_selection-016-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
